leads.reply_subject: Quick audit of Aditya Dental Care's website — two gaps I spotted
leads.reply_body: Hi there, My name is Aditya — I'm an AI & automation engineer who works exclusively with dental and dermatology practices. Your website (https://example.com) looks professional, but I ran a quick audit and found the following: 1. No online booking (patients cannot schedule appointments from the website) 2. No ai assistant or live chat (no way to answer patient questions after hours) 3. No website analytics For a dental practice, not having online booking is one of the biggest conversion killers — 67% of patients now prefer to book online rather than call, especially younger patients and working adults. Here's what I can add to Aditya Dental Care's website — custom built, not a generic plugin: → AI-powered booking system — patients book 24/7 directly from your site → Automated SMS & email reminders — reduces no-shows by up to 30% → AI chat assistant — answers patient questions instantly, including after hours → New patient intake forms — automated and paperless → Analytics dashboard — s
